commit_scope: Make the pulse witness close stale open silences through boundary_repair_protocol receipts when durable samples show enough re-entry evidence.

local_validation.notes: Whole-pulse ruff still reports pre-existing unused imports in untouched pulse_app/probe.py, pulse_app/scheduler.py, and tests/test_probe.py. This scoped patch keeps those unrelated cleanups out of the repair proof.

evidence_refs: pulse/pulse_app/analysis.py adds BoundaryRepairReceipt, reconcile_all_silences, and overall_status_with_open_silences.
pulse/pulse_app/main.py calls reconcile_all_silences before building /pulse/now, so stale open silences with enough evidence close before response.
pulse/pulse_app/storage.py preserves repair evidence in silences.note when closing a silence.
pulse/tests/test_analysis.py and pulse/tests/test_main.py prove closure, incomplete-evidence retention, and no breathing-plus-open-silence contradiction.
